reviews.review_description: Was enjoying the game, but last week after loading it, I now just get a black screen and a red beam where the right controller should be located. I've tried reinstalling without success. I've left rating at 5 stars as the game is good, and think the problem may be associated with meta updates. Can you please sort out

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and we apologize for the inconvenience. The black screen issue has been fixed

reviews.review_description:
Surprisingly fun and nice shoulder workout which is great!  Please allow option for gun to be wound with the left arm so both shoulders can feel the burn.

Even better, both arms wind the gun to unleash the snowballs and eye/head tracking aims the gun!  Now that would rock!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We will take your wishes into account and try to make the game even more enjoyable! 🎮✨

reviews.review_description: Promising game, at first it seemed monotonous, but the gradual complication made the game more interesting,I hope it will be updated

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We are glad that you are interested in the game.  We are already working on new content! Your impressions and suggestions help us make the game even better. 🚀
